commands.review_summary:
This PR replaces the bundled Ollama provider SVG with a template-safe full-body mark, adds focused provider icon rendering/resource tests, and records the change in the unreleased changelog.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is visual asset cleanup rather than a bug report. The after-change path is demonstrated by exact-head built-app screenshots and focused icon rendering tests in the PR.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed because the patch is review-clean and the remaining action is ordinary maintainer/check gating.

target.title: chore: update Ollama provider icon
target.body:
The bundled Ollama provider icon uses Ollama's official compact vector, but its detail becomes visually dense at the app's 16px rendering size. This swaps it for a template-safe vector adaptation of Ollama's separate official full-body raster mark, which reads more clearly at menu-bar and Settings sizes.

- White fill, transparent background, square viewBox - same conventions as before, so it still renders as a template image and tints correctly in Light and Dark appearances.
- Only changes the bundled provider icon resource; the separate documentation logo is left untouched.

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code).

## Maintainer validation

- Based on current `main` at `158eafa03daa6df1d82276fbac3cefe071586cc5`; contributor history and credit preserved.
- Verified the current official assets at `ollama/ollama@12e04379cd5a9a2f150104a02c5761213f4be777`: [`docs/logo.svg`](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/12e04379cd5a9a2f150104a02c5761213f4be777/docs/logo.svg), [`docs/ollama-logo.svg`](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/12e04379cd5a9a2f150104a02c5761213f4be777/docs/ollama-logo.svg), and [`docs/images/logo.png`](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/12e04379cd5a9a2f150104a02c5761213f4be777/docs/images/logo.png). Both official compact vectors remain visually dense at 16px; the replacement adapts the official full-body raster mark.
- Audited every consumer: merged and split status items, provider switcher/menu, and Settings sidebar/detail. The CLI and widget have no provider-icon surface.
- Audited the asset itself: 240x240 square viewBox, four static paths, transparent background, no scripts or external references, and no lossy raster conversion in the packaged resource.
- Added focused resource, template, and alpha-raster regression coverage.
- `swift test --filter ProviderIconResourcesTests`: 4 tests passed.
- Exact head `d6ad4fba43e4a110351ba35f4bacea6569f5cbe3`: `make check` passed package-path, dSYM, Sparkle-path, SwiftFormat, and SwiftLint checks.
- The deterministic runner passed all 435 suites on the tree-equivalent precursor; exact-head GitHub CI is the authoritative full-suite gate.
- Ad-hoc package: `0.35.1` build 86, arm64, embedded commit `d6ad4fba`; deep strict codesign verification passed.
- Both packaged Ollama SVG copies match source SHA-256 `aed9685d6dec79f85b83dbaaf0a62034bb3bc0e85b875bd35b167a010738dc5b`.
- Exact built-app Light/Dark Settings plus native 16px packaged-resource proof: [sanitized visual proof](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/steipete/CodexBar/ceefeb3b31bf9e5d22f7feaab96f480b83755e1b/.github/pr-proof/1497-ollama-final.png).
- Local autoreview: clean after one accepted test-hardening finding was fixed.
- Public Model Identifier Gate: PASS.
- Tradeoff: the replacement is a template-safe vector adaptation of Ollama's official full-body PNG, not a verbatim upstream vector asset.

commands.author: steipete
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Contributor proof and maintainer landing-direction coordination are needed; automation cannot provide the author’s Windows Session 0 evidence.; Cleared: The diff only expands existing local Windows scheduled-task fallback control flow and test mocks; it adds no dependencies, credentials, workflows, lockfile changes, or new supply-chain surface. (sha=9316bf7a68ec817e71e2262a619fb26318b5b956)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Windows scheduled-task launch fallback detection so stable non-running `other` task observations after `schtasks /Run` can continue polling and reach direct fallback launch.

PR surface: Source +11, Tests +4. Total +15 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level, but not live in this review: current main exits before fallback on stable `other`, and the linked issue gives concrete Windows Session 0 event-log steps. I did not run a real Windows Session 0 restart.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor proof and maintainer landing-direction coordination are needed; automation cannot provide the author’s Windows Session 0 evidence.
